meta.book_title: A Court of Frost and Starlight.epub

last_scene.summary: Cassian retrieves Nesta from her apartment to bring her to Feyre's meeting at the riverfront estate. Feyre, Rhys, and Amren confront Nesta about her destructive behavior and inform her she will be sent to the Illyrian Mountains with Cassian.

location.name: riverfront estate
location.description: Feyre and Rhys's new home with marble archway, white-and-sand-colored front hall, sweeping staircase, and formal study

relationship_changes.change: confrontation about destructive behavior and intervention
relationship_changes.evidence: Feyre confronts Nesta about her behavior and orders her to leave Velaris

state_changes.evidence: Feyre informs Nesta she must leave Velaris for the Illyrian Mountains with Cassian

critical_path_tail.description: Nesta angrily refuses to attend Solstice and demands rent payment
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Nesta's refusal solidifies her isolation and creates family tension that will need resolution

critical_path_tail.description: Someone knocks at the front door during the gift exchange
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Triggers Nesta's arrival and subsequent chain of events

critical_path_tail.description: Feyre opens the door to find Nesta standing outside
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Nesta's arrival changes the dynamic of the celebration

critical_path_tail.description: Nesta leaves the celebration and walks out into the freezing darkness
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Nesta leaving triggers Cassian's pursuit and their conflict

critical_path_tail.description: Nesta rejects Cassian's attempts to connect with her
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Nesta's rejection of Cassian leads to significant emotional consequences

critical_path_tail.description: Feyre mentally reveals to Rhys her desire to have a child with him
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Initiates the central plotline of Feyre and Rhys starting a family

critical_path_tail.description: Rhys stops taking his contraceptive tonic, indicating they will try to conceive
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Concrete action that enables potential pregnancy and future story developments

critical_path_tail.description: Cassian arrives at Nesta's apartment and insists she come to Feyre's meeting
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Initiates the sequence that leads to Nesta's confrontation and exile

critical_path_tail.description: Feyre, Rhys, and Amren confront Nesta about her destructive behavior
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Direct confrontation that forces the major decision about Nesta's fate

critical_path_tail.description: Feyre informs Nesta she must leave Velaris for the Illyrian Mountains with Cassian
critical_path_tail.why_critical: Major decision that changes Nesta's location and sets up future story arcs

character_states.name: Feyre
descriptions: wearing heavy charcoal sweater, tight black leggings, fleece-lined boots, hair loosely braided
silver-and-sapphire band on left hand
heavy gray coat, red-and-gray scarf from Mor's closet, gloved hands
clad in sparkling onyx gown with crescent-moon diadem
hood concealing most of her face
back cramped, stomach hungry
trembling hands balled into tight fists
midnight-blue velvet gown, hair down with silver combs
headache from drinking, tongue stuck to roof of mouth
wearing Starfall gown and diamond cuffs
wearing diamond cuffs and glittering gown
pocketing key in overcoat, hair in braid
thick long sweater, warm leggings, shearling-lined work boots splattered with paint
clad in heavy cream sweater and dark leggings
aliases: High Lady of the Night Court

canon_state.knowledge: aware of Hewn City visit requirement
canon_state.possession: owns new sketchbook, scarf, and painting satchel
canon_state.palm_tattoos: mountain with three stars (Night Court insignia)

state_transitions.new_state: aware of Hewn City visit requirement
state_transitions.evidence: Mor informs Feyre they must visit the Hewn City tonight
painting felt like a first stitch to close a wound

state_transitions.new_state: owns new sketchbook, scarf, and painting satchel
state_transitions.evidence: Rhys gives her three birthday gifts

state_transitions.new_state: mountain with three stars (Night Court insignia)
state_transitions.evidence: Rhys changed the tattoos on both her palms

character_states.name: Rhys
descriptions: chilled hands
Illyrian leathers gleamed with melted snow, snow on dark hair and wings
exhausted with heavy, slow movements
wearing only undershorts
wings still numb from flight
black jacket crafted from heavier wool, forgone wings
naked, wings draped across bed, Illyrian tattoos visible
wearing finest black jacket with silver embroidery
wearing tight black jacket, has wings
clad in usual black, High Lord's clothes, more formal than usual

canon_state.knowledge: aware of full extent of Illyrian dissent
canon_state.physical_condition: has eaten food after not eating properly all day

state_transitions.new_state: has eaten food after not eating properly all day
state_transitions.evidence: Feyre brings him food and he eats it

state_transitions.new_state: aware of full extent of Illyrian dissent
state_transitions.evidence: Azriel presents maps showing more clans than expected
He hadn't taken his contraceptive tonic with breakfast

character_states.name: Cassian
descriptions: dark hair, wings, crimson Siphons
wearing flying leathers and gloves
wind-tangled snarls in hair
snow on broad shoulders and dark hair, flushed cheeks from cold, wearing black jacket and shirt instead of leathers
wings draped over bed and floor
portrait of relaxed, arm braced against mantel, wings tucked in loosely, faint grin, glass of wine in hand
callused hands
face a mask of stone, distant since Solstice
wearing seven Siphons, red Siphon flickering

state_transitions.evidence: dumped his leather bag on the narrow bed

character_states.name: Azriel
descriptions: shadows sliding over his neck like living tattoos
scarred fingers
fine yet simple black jacket and pants, wings tucked back
clad in black jacket and pants tailored for wings, wearing Siphons
shadows twining around him

state_transitions.evidence: setting his own bag on the bed opposite Cassian's

character_states.name: Elain
descriptions: hair half up, apron over rose-pink gown dusted with flour, skin gained color, face filled in
flour-coated hands, apron over dusty-pink gown, braid
doe-brown eyes, silent demeanor

character_states.name: Mor
descriptions: flushed cheeks, braided golden hair, white fur-lined cloak, brown coat
wearing red gown with gold jewelry
thick red scarf, brown overcoat
wearing peach-colored loose pants and heavy white sweater, gold earrings
wearing Illyrian leathers, heated from the ride

canon_state.assignment: offered diplomatic mission to other territories

state_transitions.evidence: Mor experiences vivid flashback to her abandonment

state_transitions.new_state: offered diplomatic mission to other territories
state_transitions.evidence: Rhys asks Mor to win over other lands through diplomatic visits

character_states.name: Nesta
descriptions: lost weight, proud angular face with sharp cheekbones, hair in braided coronet, wearing gray gown, immaculately clean despite surroundings
baring teeth, fingers curling into invisible claws, nose crinkled with rage
snow clung to her hair, pink tinged cheeks from frigid night, solemn face
wearing simple yet elegant slate gray gown, no jewelry
books tucked under arm, cold and pale face, weight loss
gloved fingers
pale, thinner than before the war, lips bloodless, cold sharp eyes, wearing two-day-old clothes, unwashed hair, wine-stained shoes
dark blue overcoat, cerulean-and-cream scarf from Elain

state_transitions.evidence: Nesta crosses the threshold into the house

state_transitions.previous_state: receives set of five novels from Elain
state_transitions.evidence: Nesta took the banker's note for her rent money
She hadn't felt anything in months... As hollow as she felt
Feyre informs Nesta she must leave Velaris for the Illyrian Mountains with Cassian

character_states.name: Amren
descriptions: wearing enormous white fur coat, only hair and silver eyes visible above collar
seated at worktable doing jigsaw puzzle, red mouth, silver eyes, long red nails

state_transitions.evidence: Amren complains about the inconvenience of eating and bodily functions in her High Fae form

character_states.name: Lucien
descriptions: wearing sapphire jacket, mechanical eye whirring

canon_state.living_situation: belongings sent from Spring Court, staying with Band of Exiles

state_transitions.new_state: belongings sent from Spring Court, staying with Band of Exiles
state_transitions.evidence: Tamlin sent all Lucien's belongings from Spring Court, Lucien reveals he stays with Jurian and Vassa

character_states.name: Ressina
descriptions: pale green skin with rose blush, sable hair, ochre eyes, brown coat, pink scarf, slender long ears
thick long sweater, warm leggings, shearling-lined work boots splattered with paint

character_states.name: Varian
descriptions: clad in Summer Court blue and gold, silver hair

character_states.name: Devlon
descriptions: barrel chest, muscled arms, hazel eyes

character_states.name: Tamlin
descriptions: haggard, desperate for wash, shaggy hair, haunted bleak eyes, less muscled
unbound golden hair dull and matted, green eyes empty

character_states.name: weaver
descriptions: High Fae, full-figured, pale-skinned, black braided hair, gray quiet eyes, wearing thick red sweater and shearling-lined boots

character_states.name: Emerie
descriptions: scars on wings from clipping
brown eyes, dark braided hair, tan skin, narrow angular face
wearing white apron over brown dress

state_transitions.evidence: Emerie states 'This is my shop now'

relationship_summary.latest_change: confrontation about destructive behavior and intervention
relationship_summary.evidence: Feyre confronts Nesta about her behavior and orders her to leave Velaris
Feyre asks Ressina about being a business partner for the studio

relationship_summary.latest_change: decided to try for a child together
relationship_summary.evidence: Feyre revealed her desire to have a child, Rhys stopped contraceptive use

relationship_summary.latest_change: final rejection of his attempts to help
relationship_summary.evidence: Nesta rejects Cassian's gift and tells him to stop following her, treating him as if he were nothing
Elain states 'I don't want a mate. I don't want a male' and avoids interaction with Lucien

relationship_summary.latest_change: Rhys explicitly states trust in Mor's capabilities
relationship_summary.evidence: "I trust you," she said at last. I bowed my head. "Thank you."
Amren taunts Cassian about Nesta coming for Solstice and enjoying seeing her 'shred into you'

relationship_summary.latest_change: challenges Elain about accepting her Fae nature
relationship_summary.evidence: Amren questions if Elain's curiosity about form-changing is about 'your own future' rather than Amren's past

relationship_summary.latest_change: Cassian entrusts Emerie with distribution task
relationship_summary.evidence: Cassian gives Emerie money and goods to distribute to needy families

unresolved_threads.event_description: Rhys stops taking his contraceptive tonic, indicating they will try to conceive
unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: No immediate attempt to conceive, different relationship dynamics

unresolved_threads.event_description: Feyre informs Nesta she must leave Velaris for the Illyrian Mountains with Cassian

unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: Nesta's character development and story arc would have followed completely different paths

unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: Nesta never arrives, celebration continues without conflict

unresolved_threads.decision_made: Rhys and Cassian negotiate training compromise with Devlon
unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: Illyrian rebellion could escalate faster without compromise

unresolved_threads.decision_made: Rhys decides to visit Spring Court alone
unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: Different approach to assessing Tamlin's border enforcement

unresolved_threads.event_description: Feyre asks Nesta to attend Solstice celebration and offers to pay her rent as incentive
unresolved_threads.decision_made: Feyre offers to pay Nesta's rent as incentive
unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: Different approach might have yielded different response from Nesta

unresolved_threads.event_description: Nesta leaves the celebration and walks out into the freezing darkness
unresolved_threads.decision_made: Nesta chooses to leave the celebration
unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: No confrontation with Cassian, potential for reconciliation

unresolved_threads.event_description: Mor decides to avoid the mysterious watcher and returns home
unresolved_threads.alternate_timeline: Earlier discovery of the watcher's identity and intentions

unresolved_threads.event_description: Cassian arrives at Nesta's apartment and insists she come to Feyre's meeting

causal_chains.story_function: Establishes political tension and character development for Rhys and Cassian

events.description: Rhys reports he's at Devlon's camp dealing with Cassian's argument
Rhys and Cassian negotiate with Devlon about female warrior training schedule
Rhys and Cassian move to their stone house to discuss privately
Cassian reveals brewing Illyrian rebellion and dissension
Rhys admits his fears about happiness and cosmic payment
Cassian embraces Rhys and offers reassurance
Rhys returns home exhausted from the Illyrian camp covered in snow

causal_chains.story_function: Character backstory and motivation development for Cassian

events.description: Cassian flies from Windhaven toward Ramiel mountain
Cassian reflects on the Blood Rite and his past victory with Rhys and Azriel
Cassian lands at his destroyed birthplace and remembers his mother's suffering
Cassian reflects on his motivation for training Illyrian women

causal_chains.description: Feyre's Velaris activities and information gathering
causal_chains.story_function: World-building and setup for Hewn City visit plotline

events.description: Feyre meets Ressina while examining ruined buildings in the Rainbow district
Ressina invites Feyre to join her artist painting group
Mor joins Feyre while shopping for jewelry
Feyre purchases a jeweled piece for Amren's Solstice gift
Mor informs Feyre they must visit the Hewn City tonight because Eris will be there

flexible_events.description: Feyre dresses and prepares for her day
flexible_events.why_flexible: Routine daily activity with no plot significance

flexible_events.description: Feyre interacts with Nuala in the kitchen about Solstice preparations
flexible_events.why_flexible: Minor interaction about Solstice preparations, easily replaceable

flexible_events.description: Feyre purchases a jeweled piece for Amren's Solstice gift
flexible_events.why_flexible: Gift purchase detail, not essential to main plot

flexible_events.description: Feyre insists on bringing Rhys food after learning he hasn't eaten properly
flexible_events.why_flexible: Feyre could have chosen not to bring food, no major plot impact

flexible_events.description: They discuss Feyre's Fae menstrual cycle and the extreme pain she experiences twice yearly
flexible_events.why_flexible: Personal conversation that could have occurred at different time

flexible_events.description: They discuss Elain and Lucien's strained relationship and Nesta's past behavior
flexible_events.why_flexible: Personal conversation that could have occurred at different time

flexible_events.description: Feyre winnows into an abandoned gallery down the street
flexible_events.why_flexible: Feyre could have chosen to join the painting group instead of going alone

flexible_events.description: Someone knocks at the front door during the gift exchange
flexible_events.why_flexible: The knock could have been anyone or anything else

flexible_events.description: Cassian reflects on the Blood Rite and his past victory with Rhys and Azriel
flexible_events.why_flexible: Internal reflection that could occur at different times

flexible_events.description: Azriel offers to hunt down Bryaxis but Rhys declines
flexible_events.why_flexible: Rhys could have accepted Azriel's offer with minimal plot impact

flexible_events.description: Feyre approaches Ressina's studio but hesitates to join the painting group
flexible_events.why_flexible: Feyre could have joined the painting group instead of hesitating

flexible_events.description: Rhys goes to Palace of Thread and Jewels to shop for Solstice gifts
flexible_events.why_flexible: Rhys's gift shopping is optional and could have been done differently

flexible_events.description: Cassian brings Solstice decorations and playfully confronts Feyre in the foyer
flexible_events.why_flexible: Decorating activities are social and could have been organized differently

flexible_events.description: Feyre opens the door to find Nesta standing outside
flexible_events.why_flexible: Nesta could have chosen not to come to the celebration

flexible_events.description: Rhys informs Tamlin that Summer Court soldiers will be sent to his border
flexible_events.why_flexible: Border security decision could have been made through other means or at different times

flexible_events.description: Feyre comforts Cassian about the small steps toward female empowerment in Illyria
flexible_events.why_flexible: Feyre's comforting response could have taken different forms or been omitted

flexible_events.description: Nesta leaves the celebration and walks out into the freezing darkness
flexible_events.why_flexible: Nesta could have chosen to stay longer at the celebration

flexible_events.description: Rhys gifts Feyre a ruined riverside estate to rebuild as their future home
flexible_events.why_flexible: The gift of the estate could have been given at any time, not specifically tied to the child discussion

flexible_events.description: Nesta rejects Cassian's attempts to connect with her
flexible_events.why_flexible: Nesta could have accepted Cassian's attempts to connect
